description_long: This is a medium-sized, twin-engine commercial or cargo airplane with a high-wing configuration and a T-tail design. The fuselage is predominantly white with blue and gray accent stripes, and the aircraft features two turbofan engines mounted on pylons beneath the wings. The wings are straight with slight dihedral angles and red-tipped wingtips, and the tail section includes a prominent vertical stabilizer with a horizontal stabilizer mounted at the top, forming a T-tail. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows providing visibility for the crew. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with the main gear under the wings and a nose gear beneath the cockpit, all of which appear to be retractable.
description: A white, blue, and gray high-wing airplane with twin turbofan engines, T-tail, and tricycle retractable landing gear.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the T-tail, twin engines under the wings, and the full wingspan with red-tipped wingtips.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the high-wing configuration, engine placement, cockpit windows, and landing gear.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the nose, cockpit windows, engine intakes, and the straight wings with dihedral angle.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to view 1, showing the opposite side's engine, wing, and tail details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral angle and red-tipped wingtips; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin turbofan engines mounted under the wings.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer mounted at the top.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
